title: serratula lanceolata
intro: Serratula lanceolata, also known as lanceleaf milk thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts are believed to provide health benefits such as protecting the liver, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially alleviating symptoms of certain gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Serratula lanceolata are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
